code:
import io
import string

fn abs(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut have_best = false
  mut best = 0

  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if at_end
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if is_space(b)
        is_ws = true
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if not have_best
            best = v
            have_best = true
          else if abs(v) < abs(best)
            best = v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  print("min_abs=#{best}")
end
